spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates autocorrect='on' vs 'off' recommendations for input and textarea fields, aligned with the ChromeStatus motivation.

interactive.rationale: Real controls load sample HTML, run the audit, sort findings by severity weight, and generate corrected HTML.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature-index blurb matches the paste-in HTML auditor and its corrected-output workflow.

edge_cases.rationale: Audit results now weight exact-input fields, locale warnings, and spellcheck conflicts separately, with the highest-priority issue surfaced in the summary.

references.rationale: Includes a see-also section with the canonical chromestatus.com/feature/6264645053710336 link.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout; no raw hex colours remain in the concept HTML.

summary: Paste-in HTML auditor flagging precision-field misses, missing lang, and conflicting spellcheck across four example forms. It now weights severity, prioritises exact-input failures above ambiguous prose/search misses, generates fixed HTML from the parsed DOM, and embeds the canonical ChromeStatus link. Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp: the signup example produced 5 errors, priority score 20, username as a top priority, corrected username/promo autocorrect=off, and clean console/network.
